customPackagingCostsDependOn4K: Custom packaging costs depend on 4 key factors:
materialSizePrintTypeAndQuanti: material, size, print type, and quantity. Here's what real brands pay in 2025.
pricesAreApproximateAndVaryByM: *Prices are approximate and vary by material, size, and printing complexity. Contact us for an exact quote.
digitalPrintingAllowsForLowerM: Digital printing allows for lower MOQs without plate fees, significantly impacting cost.
compostableMaterialsCost1530Mo: Compostable materials cost 15-30% more than conventional plastic. Recyclable mono-PE is comparable to traditional options. Bio-PE sits in between.
theBiggestCostDriver100pcsCost: The biggest cost driver. 100pcs costs 5-8x more per unit than 10,000pcs. We offer MOQ as low as 100 pieces for digital printing.
digitalPrintingHasNoPlateCosts: Digital printing has no plate costs ($0 setup) but higher per-unit price. Plate printing (rotogravure) is cheaper per unit at 5,000+ but has $200-600 plate fees.
largerPouchesCostMoreAddOnsLik: Larger pouches cost more. Add-ons like zippers ($0.01-0.03/pc), valves ($0.02-0.05/pc), tear notches, and hang holes add small increments.
investingSlightlyMoreInQuality: Investing slightly more in quality packaging elevates your brand's perceived value.
